claim_boundary: This receipt is the execution gate for the 10 selected Phase 3 IFC clean/dirty contracts. It does not download files, approve licenses, approve redistribution, or turn text-scan import health into solver accuracy evidence.

silent_import_loss_gate.claim_boundary: This gate proves zero silent IFC import loss only when every selected clean/dirty IFC case is acquired, checksummed, import-health executed, entity-accounted, and quantity-credit ready. Text-scan accounting is not solver-ready geometry evidence.
